channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年6月28日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 IP Crawl: Living atlas of open webcams discovered on the public internet #2 Anonymous GitHub account mass-dropping undisclosed 0-days #3 OpenRA #4 Show HN: Adrafinil – keep a lid-closed Mac awake only while agents work #5 'Careless People' author claims Meta surveilled her for 12mos to enforce silence #6 DSpark: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference [pdf] #7 AI learns the “dark art” of RFIC design #8 Turn your site into a place people can bump into each other #9 Fintech Engineering Handbook #10 GLP-1 drugs led to weight loss and reversed depression-like behavior in mice

item.title: 2026年6月27日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Why have papers by one of history's most famous physicists been retracted? #2 Incident CVE-2026-LGTM #3 The Exhaustion of Talking to a Tool #4 Ultrasound Imaging of the Brain #5 Jolla Phone, Over 13 500 units sold #6 New satellites from years to weeks, days, or hours #7 Om Malik has died #8 An entire Herculaneum scroll has been read for the first time #9 Run isolated sandboxes with full lifecycle control: AWS introduces MicroVMs #10 The AI industry is pouring millions into US elections

item.description: #1 Show HN: I made Google Trends for Hacker News by indexing 18 years of comments #2 Ford rehires 350 engineers after AI fails to preserve expertise or train juniors #3 Zig's New BitCast Semantics and LLVM Back End Improvements #4 You can't unit test for taste #5 Apple increases MacBook and iPad prices by 20% #6 Half-Life 2 in a Browser #7 Show HN: Turn native language audio into flashcards and shadowing practice #8 Anthropic says Alibaba illicitly extracted Claude AI model capabilities #9 Tw-fade: pure CSS scroll-driven edge masking #10 LastPass notifies users of yet another data breach
